queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and its role as a determinant of elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default probability associated with negative checking account balances and their inverse relationship with key credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of employment durations under one year on credit default probability and its contribution to increased credit risk exposure.
